core_principle.statement: Color misuse directly destroys system perception and shifts the brand away from engineering authority.
core_principle.interpretation: Every incorrect use of color weakens the architectural engineering identity and increases misclassification risk.

critical_misuse_patterns.name: Gold Overuse
critical_misuse_patterns.definition: Using the authority accent (#B89A63) beyond its 10% rule or as a dominant color.
critical_misuse_patterns.risk: Shifts perception from engineering system → luxury decoration brand

critical_misuse_patterns.name: Decorative Gradient Usage
critical_misuse_patterns.definition: Applying gradients or blended colors for aesthetic effect.
critical_misuse_patterns.risk: Breaks engineering logic and introduces decorative branding perception

critical_misuse_patterns.name: Over-Saturation of Architectural Layer
critical_misuse_patterns.definition: Using architectural colors as attention-driven elements instead of spatial support.
critical_misuse_patterns.risk: Destroys spatial hierarchy and architectural neutrality
examples: Colored sections competing with engineering layer

critical_misuse_patterns.name: Engineering Layer Weakening
critical_misuse_patterns.definition: Reducing dominance of engineering colors in structural UI or typography.
examples: Using light neutral colors for main text

critical_misuse_patterns.name: Mixed Layer Confusion
critical_misuse_patterns.definition: Using engineering, architectural, and accent colors without role separation.
critical_misuse_patterns.risk: Breaks system logic and creates visual inconsistency

system_breaking_behaviors.impact: Breaks perception of engineering system and reduces EPC-level trust

corrective_rules.rule_3: Architectural layer must define space, not attention
corrective_rules.rule_4: Accent layer must only signal transformation points
corrective_rules.rule_5: If unsure, default to engineering layer dominance

before_use: Is architectural layer only providing space?
Is there any gradient usage? (must be NO)

strategic_risk_summary.main_risk: Brand perception shift from Engineering System → Decorative Brand
strategic_risk_summary.secondary_risk: Loss of trust in EPC and architectural markets
strategic_risk_summary.prevention: Strict enforcement of AECS system logic in all design outputs
